summary: Fix a variable used before @onready initialization in _init
prompt: The script below crashes because `_label` is accessed in `_init()` before `@onready` variables are populated. In Godot 4, `@onready` vars are set during `_ready()`, not `_init()`. Move the label initialization to `_ready()` instead.
evaluation_notes: Bug: _init() runs before the scene tree is available, so @onready vars are null. Fix: move _label.text assignment to _ready(). The @onready declaration remains at class level.
